channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: CCTV Footage Reveals Movements of Missing Kenya High Student Joy Wanjiru Before Disappearance
item.description: The family of sixteen-year-old Joy Wanjiru is going through a painful period as the search for their missing daughter enters its tenth day. CCTV footage obtained from several places in Karatina, Nyeri...

item.title: Mojtaba Khamenei Recovering from Serious Injuries in Tehran Attack
item.description: Iran’s newly appointed Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, son of the late Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, is reportedly still recovering from severe injuries sustained during an airstrike that also claimed his...

item.title: CBSE Class 10 Results 2026 Likely to Be Declared Next Week Due to Upcoming Improvement Exams
item.description: The Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) is preparing to announce the Class 10 board exam results for the academic session 2026 in the coming week. Around 25 lakh students who appeared for the ...

item.title: Millicent Omanga shares how her husband supported her university journey with HELB
item.description: Aspiring Nairobi Woman Representative Millicent Omanga recently opened up about how her husband, Francis Nyamiobo, played a big role in her academic journey. Omanga, who had lost her father while in F...

item.title: Rivers State Government Prioritizes Transparency in Healthcare Partnership
item.description: The Deputy Governor of Rivers State has emphasized the need for collaboration and transparency in the operations of the Rivers State Health Care Partnership Program (RIVCHPP) and the Primary Health Ca...

item.title: Understanding Endometriosis: Signs, Causes, and Management of Painful Periods
item.description: Many women dey suffer serious pain during their period, but e no suppose be like that. This article from Pulse Nigeria explain say painful periods wey too much, wey dey disturb your daily life, or wey...

item.title: Pakistani PM holds separate meetings with US and Iranian officials before peace talks
item.description: Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has held separate meetings with both US and Iranian officials as a prelude to upcoming peace negotiations. US Vice President JD Vance, together with special env...

item.title: Tareena Shakil: Rebuilding Life After Joining Islamic State
item.description: Tareena Shakil, once the first British woman convicted of joining Islamic State, has reinvented herself as a social media influencer offering dating advice. Shakil fled to Syria in 2014 with her one-y...

item.title: Cignal Super Spikers Take Early Lead in PVL Semifinals with 4-Set Win Over Farm Fresh
item.description: In the ongoing Premier Volleyball League (PVL) All-Filipino Conference semifinals, the Cignal Super Spikers have taken an early advantage against the Farm Fresh Foxies by winning a competitive four-se...

item.title: Rivers State Deputy Governor Emphasizes Collaboration and Transparency in Public Management

item.title: Challenges and frustrations of using ride-hailing services in Tanzania
item.description: This week, the journalist decided to fully commit to using ride-hailing apps instead of her usual routines. She quickly discovered that ordering a car in Tanzania has become unpredictable and stressfu...

item.title: Filipino Celebrities Congratulate BINI After Historic Coachella Performance
item.description: Filipino P-pop group BINI achieved a significant global milestone by performing at the prestigious Coachella Valley Music and Arts Festival, one of the biggest music events in the world. This appearan...

item.title: KRA Announces 8% Fringe Benefit Tax Interest Rate for Q2 2026
item.description: The Kenya Revenue Authority (KRA) has officially set the market interest rate for Fringe Benefit Tax (FBT) at 8% for the period April to June 2026. This applies to loans given by employers to employee...

item.title: Eamonn Holmes hospitalised following stroke, remains under treatment
item.description: Eamonn Holmes, the 66-year-old GB News presenter, was admitted to hospital earlier this week after suffering a stroke. He had previously caused concern among viewers after showing signs of fatigue and...

item.title: Montreal festival highlights comedy, circus acts, and quirky performances
item.description: Montreal is hosting a vibrant festival celebrating the whimsical and humorous side of performing arts. The event showcases a variety of performances, from clowns and acrobats to absurd and eccentric a...

item.title: London to see early chill followed by warmer, sunny days ahead
item.description: The weather in London, Ontario began cool on Saturday but is set to end with clear skies and more comfortable warmth, marking a shift towards milder spring conditions. Meteorologists report that after...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Hosts US-Iran Delegations in Islamabad to Facilitate Peace Talks
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif met with United States Vice President JD Vance on Saturday in Islamabad, marking the start of high-level talks between the US and Iran. The visit comes amid a two-week ha...

item.title: A Reflection on Customer Service in Our Local Bars
item.description: In this lighthearted commentary, writer Wa Muyanza captures a familiar scene in many Tanzanian bars: a customer waiting in vain for a waiter to bring another beer. After finishing his first bottle, th...

item.title: Patrick Aquino appointed as interim coach of Blackwater after Jeff Cariaso’s resignation
item.description: Patrick Aquino has been appointed as the interim head coach of the Blackwater Bossing in the Philippine Basketball Association (PBA) following the sudden resignation of Jeff Cariaso. The management of...

item.title: Challenges of Verifying Real and Synthetic Content Online
item.description: The article explores how the rise of synthetic media and generative AI is overwhelming traditional methods of verification online. From AI-generated images to restricted access to satellite imagery, v...
